title: AciCommandContract
description: The core ACI (Agent-Computer Interface) contract returned by CmdHub search and execution.

name.description: The base command alias used in the terminal (e.g., 'sl')

cmd_path.description: The materialized path to this specific sub-command or argument (e.g., 'sl.-l')

description.description: Highly refined, Agent-friendly description of what this command/flag does.

example_template.description: A ready-to-execute string template (e.g., 'sl -l'). Agents can inject dynamic values here.

install_instructions.description: Cross-platform installation commands if the tool is missing locally.
